[फा. सं. 11031/06/2015-अ.भा.से. –II(क)] राजेश कुमार यादव, अवर सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी णी णी णी ((((1111):):):): इस अिधसूचना के जारी होने के पूव榁, छ牵ीसगढ़ क琉 कुल 灹ािधकृत संख्या 178 थी । 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी णी णी णी ((((2222):):):): 灹धान िविनयम 22 अ榉तूबर, 1955 क琉 एस.आर.ओ. सं. 3350 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴 म犆 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे तथा छ牵ीसगढ़ के िन瀓निलिखत सा.का.िन. सं榐या猒 तथा ितिथय犘 獧ारा उ瀈ह犆 संशोिधत 琈कया गया था: - MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th November, 2016 G.S.R. 1061(E).– In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Chhattisgarh, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Third Amendment Regulations, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the Schedule, for the heading “Chhattisgarh” and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “Chhattisgarh Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 105 Chief Secretary 1 President, Board of Revenue 1 Agriculture Production Commissioner 1 Principal Secretary to Government 7 Director General Administrative Academy 1 Principal Secretary to HCM 1 Chief electoral Officer 1 Secretary to Government 11 Member Board of Revenue 1 Commissioner, Commercial Taxes 1 Commissioner, Govt. of Chhattisgarh, New Delhi 1 Registrar, Co-operative Societies 1 Labour Commissioner 1 灙म सं榐या 灙म सं榐या 灙म सं榐या 灙म सं榐या सा सा सा सा....का का का का....िन िन िन िन.... सं榐या सं榐या [फा. सं. 11031/06/2015 -अ.भा.से.-II-ख] राजेश कुमार यादव, अवर सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी णी णी णी : - 灹धान िनयम भारत के असाधारण राजप灴 म犆 सा.का.िन. सं. 870(अ) 琈दनांक 08 िसत瀓बर, 2016 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और बाद म犆 िन瀓निलिखत सा.का.िन. और सं榐या 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कए गए थे। NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th November, 2016 G.S.R. 1062 (E).– In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Chhattisgarh hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, namely: ─ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Amendment Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, in Schedule II,– (a) in Part A relating to Posts carrying pay above the Senior Scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Chhattisgarh” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “CHHATTISGARH (1) Chief Secretary Level 17 in the pay matrix (2) President, Board of Revenue Level 17 in the pay matrix (3) Agriculture Production Commissioner Level 17 in the pay matrix (4) Principal Secretary to Government Level 15 in the pay matrix (5) Director General Administrative Academy Level 15 in the pay matrix (6) Principal Secretary to HCM Level 15 in the pay matrix (7) Chief electoral Officer Level 14 in the pay matrix (8) Secretary to Government Level 14 in the pay matrix (9) Member Board of Revenue Level 14 in the pay matrix (10) Commissioner, Commercial Taxes Level 14 in the pay matrix -- 6 of 7 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 (11) Commissioner, Govt. of Chhattisgarh, New Delhi Level 14 in the pay matrix (12) Registrar, Co-operative Societies Level 14 in the pay matrix (13) Labour Commissioner Level 14 in the pay matrix (14) Excise Commissioner Level 14 in the pay matrix (15) Commissioner, Tribal Development Level 14 in the pay matrix (16) Commissioner, Industries Level 14 in the pay matrix (17) Development Commissioner Level 14 in the pay matrix (18) Divisional Commissioners Level 14 in the pay matrix (19) Commissioner, Agriculture Level 14 in the pay matrix (20) Commissioner, Transport Level 14 in the pay matrix (21) Commissioner, Land Records Level 14 in the pay matrix”; (b) in Part B relating to Posts carrying pay in the Senior Scale of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments including posts carrying Special Allowance in addition to pay, in the table for the entries occurring under Chhattisgarh the following shall be substituted,– “CHHATTISGARH (1) Collector (2) Executive Director, DRDA and Ex-officio, CEO, District Panchayat / Additional Collector (3) Municipal Commissioner (4) Additional Secretary/Joint Secretary/ /Deputy Secretary to Government (5) Director, Public Instruction (6) Director, Women and Child Development (7) Director, Urban Administration (8) Director, Panchayat & Social Welfare (9) Director, Food Civil Supplies & Consumer Protection (10) Secretary, Public Service Commission (11) Director, Treasuries and Accounts (12) Director, Institutional Finance (13) Director, Budget (14) Director, Local Fund Audit”. [F. No. 11031/06/2015- AIS-II (B)] RAJESH KUMAR YADAV, Under Secy.
